pool.baseline:
hey i keep getting these intermittent "Connection Reset by Peer" errors on one of our ec2 instances in the prod environment. it's super frustrating because it only happens every few hours and then clears up. 

here is a snippet from the cloudwatch logs:
[2023-10-27T14:22:01Z] ERROR: connection reset by peer (errno 104)
[2023-10-27T14:22:05Z] INFO: retrying connection...
[2023-10-27T14:22:06Z] ERROR: connection reset by peer (errno 104)

could this be something with our security group settings or maybe an idle timeout on the load balancer? thanks.
